item.title: Hololive Vtubers Fuwamoco Sing Nekopara After Song - Siliconera
hololive English -Advent- are teaming up with SUSHIRO TAIWAN Starting June 16! | COVER Corp. - カバー株式会社
hololive English -Advent- are teaming up with SUSHIRO TAIWAN Starting June 16! | NEWS - hololive.hololivepro.com
hololive English -Advent- are teaming up with SUSHIRO TAIWAN Starting June 16!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: June 16, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced that hololive English -Advent- of hololive production, will be collaborating with SUSHIRO TAIWAN. Merchandise and theme store activities will start on June 16th and end on August 10th.hololive English -Advent- are coming to Ximending! On Friday, June 13th at 8:00 PM Local Time, hololive English -Advent- will appear on the big screen of the Watsons Wuchang store in Ximending, Taipei. Join us for this special event and be part of the excitement!SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- stores will launch on Monday, June 16th. Exclusive merchandise, themed menu items, and specially decorated stores. Don’t miss out on this exciting opportunity to enjoy delicious sushi while collecting must-have collaboration goods!The event includes exclusive gift-with-purchases, add-on purchase promotions, as well as four limited-time collaborative sushi dishes. Every order comes with a special insert card and a surprise badge from a blind bag!SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Collaboration Gift[SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Collaboration Gift With Purchase Part 1]Event Period: Starting from June 30th, 2024 while supplies last.Event Rules: Customers spending over NT$700 at any Sushiro store across Taiwan and clicking the Like button on the official Sushiro Facebook will receive one SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- A4 file folder.・ SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- A4 file folder*6 designs in total, randomly distributed; limited to one per transaction.[SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Collaboration Gift With Purchase Part 2]Event Period: Starting from July 28th, 2024 while supplies last.Event Rules: Customers spending over NT$700 at any Sushiro store across Taiwan and clicking the Like button on the official Sushiro Facebook will receive one SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Blind Bag Clear Card.・ SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Blind Bag Clear Card*6 designs in total, randomly distributed; limited to one per transaction.SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Collaboration Add-On[SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Add-On Merchandise Promotions – Part 1]Event Period: Starting from June 16th, 2024 while supplies last.Event Rules: Customers spending over NT$600 at any Sushiro store across Taiwan can add-on one SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Blind Pack Chibi Acrylic Standee Blind Bag for just NT$200. Spend NT$1,200 to get two for NT$400, and NT$1,800 to get three for NT$600.・ SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Blind Pack Chibi Acrylic Standee*6 designs in total, randomly distributed; limited to three per transaction.[SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Add-On Merchandise Promotions – Part 2]Event Period: Starting from July 14th, 2024 while supplies last.Event Rules: Customers spending over NT$600 at any Sushiro store across Taiwan can add-on one SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Large Desk Mouse Pad for just NT$500. Spend NT$1,200 to get two for NT$1,000, and NT$1,800 to get three for NT$1,500.・ SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Large Desk Mouse Pad*1 design in total; limited to three per transaction.SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Exclusive Menu ItemsCollect Insert Cards and Badges with Every Order!From June 16th, order any of the following collaboration dishes in-store at SUSHIRO TAIWAN and receive both a hololive English -Advent- insert card and a mystery badge:Salmon Tamago Roll – Shiori Novella Insert Card Meat & Egg Inari Sushi – Nerissa Ravencroft Insert Card Fried Chicken Gunkan – Koseki Bijou Insert Card Seared Shrimp Duo – FUWAMOCO (Fuwawa Abyssgard・Mococo Abyssgard) Insert CardEach talent has 2 insert card designs (Character and Fan-themed), randomly given. There are 12 badge designs, and with just NT$100, you get the dish, insert card, badge, and a chance at a special draw! Grab yours while supplies last!・ SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- 12 Mystery Badge BonusDive Into the World of hololive English -Advent- at Three Themed StoresExperience the magic where Virtual meets Reality at three specially-themed SUSHIRO TAIWAN locations:スシロー壽司郎 台北中華路店（TWSUSHIRO Taipei Zhonghua Road）：1F., No. 41, Sec. 1, Zhonghua Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei Cityスシロー壽司郎 台中黎明市政南店（TWSUSHIRO Taichung Liming）：No. 158, Shizheng S. 1st Rd., Nantun Dist., Taichung Cityスシロー壽司郎 高雄義享天地店（TWSUSHIRO Kaohsiung ESKY LAND）：5F., No. 115, Gushan Dist., Kaohsiung CityGet up close and personal with your favorite talents and immerse yourself in a one-of-a-kind themed dining experience!SUSHIRO TAIWAN x hololive English -Advent- Lucky Draw EventStarting June 23, Bring Home Limited Goods! Win Exclusive Merchandise in Our Giveaway Event!From June 23 to August 10th, SUSHIRO TAIWAN is hosting a Giveaway Event packed with exciting prizes, rolling out in three phases! Event Period: June 23th to July 6th, 2025. Event Rules: Like the Sushiro Taiwan Facebook page and share the hololive English -Advent- collaboration menu post to enter the draw. You could win an exclusive Chibi Plush Keychain!*There will be 5 winners in total from Facebook. Event Period: Event Rules: Like the Sushiro Taiwan Facebook page, follow the official Instagram, and tag a friend you’d like to dine with at Sushiro. You could win a 3D Character EZ-Link Card Blind Box!*There will be 18 winners in total: 9 from Facebook and 6 from Instagram. Event Period: Event Rules: Leave a supportive message for hololive English -Advent- in the comments of the designated Instagram event post to enter the draw. You could win a Message Card!*There will be 8 winners in total from Instagram. These rare official merchandise items are only available through this promotion. Dine at SUSHIRO TAIWAN and test your luck—don’t miss your chance to bring home these must-have collectibles!Special Collaboration Merchandise – Pre-order Now!The “hololive English -Advent- Chibi Plush Keychains” and “ADVENT 3D iPASS Blind Boxes” are both available for pre-order now on anikoko’s official website: http://anikoko.com If you’re a fan of hololive English -Advent- don’t miss out on the pre-order period from June 16th to August 18th, 2025!

item.title: Hololive Vtubers Participate in Sleep Fighter II eSports Cup - Siliconera
Latest Hololive Nendoroid Is a Casual Usada Pekora Figure - Siliconera
Hololive Night Returns to Dodger Stadium for 2025 Show - The Outerhaven
World's Biggest VTubers Return to Dodger Stadium for Hololive Night 2025 - Comic Book Resources
Hololive Dodgers Vtubers and Merchandise Revealed - siliconera.com
The Dodgers x Hololive VTuber Collab Continues. This Time, With a Charming New Idea - VICE
hololive night Collaboration Event Returns to Dodger Stadium on July 5th, 2025! | COVER Corp. - カバー株式会社
hololive night Collaboration Event Returns to Dodger Stadium on July 5th, 2025! | NEWS - hololive.hololivepro.com
hololive night Collaboration Event Returns to Dodger Stadium on July 5th, 2025!
item.author: Horii
item.content:encoded: June 9, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN — COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo, Japan, CEO: Motoaki Tanigo) announced the second collaboration between the Los Angeles Dodgers and hololive production, taking place on Saturday, July 5th, 2025, at 4:15 PM (PDT).After a successful first collaboration with the Los Angeles Dodgers last year, “hololive night” will return to Dodgers Stadium again a second time. This year’s collaboration will feature the first-ever VTuber livestream both to and from Dodger Stadium. To furthermore commemorate this unique evening, co-branded Dodgers x hololive production merchandise will be available to purchase in the gift shops across the stadium.Fans can expect exclusive in-stadium appearances from three hololive English talents, Ninomae Ina’nis, IRyS and Koseki Bijou in real time. The hololive talents will not only cheer for the Dodgers, but also provide their sing-along version of “Take Me Out to the Ball Game” during the seventh-inning stretch of the baseball game. At the end of the game, fans will be invited to join the talents on the field, where they will host special programming such as interactive activities, and a new “WHO’S got the MOVES?!?!” segment where fans can dance and jam together to popular hololive tunes. In addition, this special event will be broadcast live to hololive English’s official YouTube channel, marking the first time ever in history for a VTuber company to stream both to and from Dodger Stadium. Fans can also enjoy a vast series of onsite hololive-themed activities, such as taking pictures with the featured talent’s cutouts, helping themselves to delicious stadium food and drinks with event-only hololive themed packaging, and more to be announced via hololive English’s official social media channels later.The hololive night ticket package includes a ticket to baseball game as well as event-exclusive Dodger x hololive production trading cards (pack of three) that feature the three main cast of this year’s event in Dodgers uniforms. Lucky fans may even draw a special version of the cards that include the talent’s printed autograph!Get hyped with us for this exciting collaboration between the Los Angeles Dodgers and hololive production! We hope to see you at the game.Official Hashtag: #hololiveDodgers・ “Play Ball!” Announcement ・ “Take Me Out to The Ball Game” Sing-a-long ・ Photo Spot with Life-size Cutouts ・ Event-Only Food & Beverage Packaging ・ holodance Crowd Dance Project ・ First-ever VTuber Livestream from the Stadium … and MORE!Collaboration Merchandise(*Products under development)Available from July 5th, 2025 in all shops inside Dodger Stadium. *While supplies last!On July 5th at Dodger Stadium, special beer, soda, and popcorn cups will be offered in hololive collaboration packaging. Please enjoy these special collaboration designs, which can only be enjoyed during hololive night.hololive night Ticket Informationhololive night Ticket Purchase Bonus: Special Trading Cards (pack of three)For the first time in history, a VTuber livestream will be held at and from Dodger Stadium. The livestream will be available on YouTube, allowing people from all over the world to experience the thrill of the event in real time. ・ Dance Project “WHO’S got the MOVES?!?!” The livestream will feature a dance project segment taking place at Dodger Stadium. Songs by hololive production talents will be played at the stadium, and those who want to try their hand at the choreography will dance together! The song selection will be announced later on hololive production’s official social media.The stream will also feature other surprises from hololive production, including past videos, so be sure to tune in! Despite her looks, Ina’nis is actually a priestess of the Ancient Ones. One day, she picked up a strange book and then started to gain the power of controlling tentacles. To her, tentacles are just a part in her ordinary life; it has never been a big deal for her. However, her girly mind does want to get them dressed up and stay pretty. After gaining power, she started hearing Ancient Whispers and Revelations. Hence, she began her VTuber activities to deliver random sanity checks on humanity, as an ordinary girl. A Nephilim who was once the embodiment of hope back in “The Paradise”. While she has left to set off on an adventure, she continues to deliver hope through her lyrics and songs, with determination in her voice. She also bears the precarious and unstable dual nature of a half-demon and half-angel; this phenomenon can be observed on rare occasions, in the form of the most unpredictably yaba—*ahem*, “surprising”, comments from IRyS herself. Bewildering those around her is but another unexpected charm of her duality. Formed from the crystallization of all forms of human emotion, Koseki Bijou is “The Jewel of Emotions.” Over years and years, emotions of beauty and filth alike have woven into her under immense pressure, resulting in an unmatched brilliance. Her ancient, mystic brilliance caused strife between the masses of the greedy, who fought over ownership of her. This led to her being imprisoned in secrecy, far from the reach of humans. It seems as though when she encounters people, and particularly their good emotions, her radiance shines even brighter.

item.title: Another Hololive Dodgers Night Will Take the Field - Siliconera
Here’s a Super Cute Hololive Idle Game. It’s Out on Steam Today. Go Nuts - VICE
Death Stranding 2 x Hololive: A Surprise Collaboration - DLCompare.com
COVER Corporation Collaborates with We's Star Ltd. for Mori Calliope themed New Liqueur “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月” | NEWS - ホロライブ公式サイト
COVER Corporation Collaborates with We’s Star Ltd. for Mori Calliope themed New Liqueur “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月”
item.author: Horii
item.content:encoded: COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced an upcoming collaboration between VTuber agency hololive production and We’s Star Ltd. (Taichung City, Taiwan) for the new Mori Calliope themed liqueur “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月”. Following the 2023 release of “もり桜・金箔” and the 2024 release of “もり桜・一輪花” the latest creation, “もり桜・花鳥風月” will be available starting June 10th, 2025.This collaboration is a fusion of “森カリオペ” unique charm and the refined aesthetic of “花道物語” “MoriZakura もり桜・花鳥風月” is inspired by the concept of “beautiful natural scenery,” capturing the visual and flavor profile of cherry blossoms. It delivers a unique experience characteristic of sakura liqueur.: For individual purchases, tapestry (one of the four illustration designs) will be shipped randomly.: Scheduled to start around June 2025About 重星戰略, We’s Star LTD. Aligned with the strategic rhythm of the global market, We’s Star LTD. gathers experts in prototyping, art, and marketing to create outstanding IP works with high standards. The company invests in the international market, collaborating with world-class IPs, companies, brands, and partners to build global strategies. We’s Star Official X (Twitter)： https://x.com/wesstar_corp 重星戰略企劃有限公司 / 重星戦略大阪株式会社

First Store in West Japan! hololive production official shop in Osaka Umeda Opening Soon!
item.author: narita
item.content:encoded: Scheduled to Open on June 27th, 2025!hololive production official shop in Osaka Umeda will be the first store to open in western Japan, and the second store nationwide, and will feature new items using exclusive visuals drawn by illustrators 三九呂 and むぎた.The first part of this series will feature five talents, with future releases scheduled. Apart from a selection of official hololive production merchandise, exclusive content will also be available.The hololive production official shop in Osaka Umeda offers an abundance of attractive content, so don’t miss this chance to visit us.Shop Name： hololive production official shop in Osaka Umeda Location：Osaka 1-1-3 Shibata, Kita-ku, Osaka 530-0012 HANKYU SANBAN GAI Kita-kan B1F Dates： Friday, June 27th, 2025 to Spring 2026 Operating hours： 10AM – 9PM* Same as the operating hours for HANKYU SANBAN GAI.As we expect a surge of visitors , we will limit entries using LivePocket-Ticket-. Please register from the application pages below.Dates of restricted entriesAdditionally, we will be restricting entry and handing out numbered tickets should there be a high number of customers aside from the aforementioned dates.Store-original merchandise will be available in advance. * There may be purchase limitations due to limited stock. * We will try to ensure there are sufficient stocks, but please understand that they may still sell out. * We cannot answer inventory-related inquiries (available quantities, restock dates, etc.). * We will be selling merchandise from this store post this event. * Images are for illustrative purposes only. Actual products may differ.Featured Talents for Part One Shirakami Fubuki / Nakiri Ayame / Houshou Marine / Shishiro Botan / Kikirara Vivi ・ New arrivals of store-original merchandise ・ A selection of merchandise from the hololive production OFFICIAL SHOP * ・ A selection of licensed merchandise from hololive production* The lineup will not include talent anniversary or made-to-order merchandise. Once sold out, some merchandise may no longer be available.Novelties will differ depending on the period and amount purchased. We will gift novelties on a first-come, first-served basis when you purchase over a certain amount in-store.* Randomized novelties will not be able to be chosen and will only be available while stocks last.Novelty giveaway period： From Sunday, June 27th, 2025, while stocks last. ・ Every 3,300 yen (tax incl.) spent in a single purchase will entitle customers to one hololive production official shop in Osaka Umeda original Vol.1 Uchiwa (handheld fan) (5 Designs/Randomized) ・ Single purchases over 11,000 yen (tax incl.) will entitle customers to one hololive production official shop in Osaka Umeda original bag (1 type)In addition, any customers who show staff that they have registered for an account on the holoplus app will receive an additional novelty. Download holoplus* All novelties are available while stocks last.We will continue to provide more exciting content for everyone who visits us at the HANKYU SANBAN GAI, so be sure to stay updated for the latest news.① Life-sized illustrated panels of the talents as shop staff displayed outside the store For a limited time, life-sized panels of talents as shop staff will be displayed in HANKYU SANBAN GAI. When： Friday, June 27th – Friday, July 25th, 2025 (Illustrated by 三九呂)② Mini-character illustration of talents as shop staff displayed by the escalator in front of the store Mini-character illustration of talents as a shop staff will appear in the open area inside HANKYU SANBAN GAI.③ In-store special announcements Apart from original in-store announcements by the five featured talents, you will also get to hear announcements from hololive production’s official anchorwoman, Harusaki Nodoka.④ A message from the talents The store will feature autographs and messages written by the featured talents.

item.title: HyperX x IRyS Collaboration Keycap and Headset Accessory are Now Available
item.author: Horii
item.content:encoded: COVER Corporation has announced a collaboration between HyperX and hololive production, introducing an exclusive keycap and headset accessory featuring IRyS of hololive English -Promise-.The keycaps and headset accessory will be available on the HyperX official website starting May 27th at 12 PM PST.

item.title: "I lean on the ace spectrum": Hololive VTuber Gigi Murin opens up about her sexuality - Sportskeeda
HyperX x IRyS Collaboration Keycap and Headset Accessory are Now Available | NEWS - hololive.hololivepro.com
hololive production 2nd World Tour Concert “hololive STAGE World Tour'25 -Synchronize!-” Key Visual, New Cities, New Guests, and Merchandise Announcement | COVER Corp. - カバー株式会社
hololive production 2nd World Tour Concert “hololive STAGE World Tour'25 -Synchronize!-” Key Visual, New Cities, New Guests, and Merchandise Announcement | NEWS - Hololive
hololive production 2nd World Tour Concert “hololive STAGE World Tour’25 -Synchronize!-” Key Visual, New Cities, New Guests, and Merchandise Announcement
item.author: Horii
item.content:encoded: COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Motoaki Tanigo) is pleased to announce the key visual, new cities, special guests, and merchandise for the second world tour concert, “hololive STAGE World Tour’25 -Synchronize!”.The key visual for “hololive STAGE World Tour’25 -Synchronize!” has now been unveiled. It features Momosuzu Nene, Kureiji Ollie, Mori Calliope, IRyS, and Nerissa Ravencroft dressed in stylish costumes. Additional information on special guests has also been released. First, Fuwawa Abyssgard and Mococo Abyssgard of hololive English -Advent- will be special guests at the Vancouver show. Akai Haato and Natsuiro Matsuri of the hololive 1st generation will appear at the New York show. Stay tuned for more information about guests at upcoming shows.Two cities that have been newly added to the world tour have also been revealed. The first is Seoul. This will be the first time hololive production performs a 3D concert there. The second is Taipei. Taipei was on the world tour last year and will be again this year. More information about the Seoul and Taipei concert dates and venues will be announced at a later date.An original theme song for the world tour is currently in the works. It will be sung by Momosuzu Nene, Kureiji Ollie, Mori Calliope, IRyS, and Nerissa Ravencroft. Please look forward to its release!

item.title: Makeship and hololive production Announce Adorable New Plushie Collection Featuring hololive English -Advent-! | NEWS - hololive.hololivepro.com
Makeship and hololive production Announce Adorable New Plushie Collection Featuring hololive English -Advent-! | COVER Corp. - カバー株式会社
Makeship and hololive production Announce Adorable New Plushie Collection Featuring hololive English -Advent-!
item.author: Horii
item.content:encoded: COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) announced today the release of the MAKESHIP x hololive English -Advent- exclusive plush collection, featuring members of hololive English -Advent-.The collection of plushies featuring the five captivating members of hololive English -Advent-: Nerissa Ravencroft, Shiori Novella, Koseki Bijou, and the twin hounds Fuwawa Abyssgard and Mococo Abyssgard.Following the overwhelming support for previous hololive production and Makeship collaborations, this new project will allow fans worldwide to bring home their very own cuddly companions inspired by the unique personalities and iconic designs of hololive English -Advent- members. Each plushie has been crafted to capture the lovely relationships between each member and their mascots.The plushie campaign will run for a limited time. Visit the Makeship website during the campaign to pre-order your favorite hololive English -Advent- members plushies and help bring this exciting project to life. Get ready, adventurers!MAKESHIP x hololive English -Promise- Plushie Collection Makeship is a platform that empowers creators and communities to bring their unique ideas to life through limited-edition physical products, primarily plushies. By utilizing a crowdfunding model, Makeship ensures that only successfully funded projects are produced, fostering a direct connection between creators and their fans.

item.title: WATCH/LISTEN: hololive VTuber Mori Calliope is Here to Sell Out Shows and Share Anime Faves - Crunchyroll
WATCH/LISTEN: hololive VTuber Mori Calliope is Here to Sell Out Shows and Share Anime Faves - Crunchyroll
CAPSULE x hololive production x “Cheer UP” Event Comes to Los Angeles | COVER Corp. - カバー株式会社
CAPSULE x hololive production x “Cheer UP” Event Comes to Los Angeles | NEWS - hololive.hololivepro.com
CAPSULE x hololive production x “Cheer UP” Event Comes to Los Angeles
item.author: Horii
item.content:encoded: COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced that the CAPSULE x hololive production collaboration eventcollaboration event “Cheer UP road running” and “Theme Café” will take place in Los Angeles, USA, this autumn.The collaboration event “Cheer UP” will be held with the cheerleading style of concept, there will be limited merchandise and foods featuring members of hololive production including Oozora Subaru and Usada Pekora of hololive, Kaela Kovalskia and Kobo Kanaeru of hololive Indonesia, and Mori Calliope and Koseki Bijou of hololive English.hololive production Cheer UP Fun Run $125 Ticket Includes: • Runner Bib • Official Event T-shirt • Medal • One Magnetic Badge$185 Ticket Includes Everything Above, Plus: • Sports TowelEarly Bird Perk and Exclusive Merchandise Participants who register by June 15, 2025, will receive a special early registration gift: A randomly selected sticker set.Available only at the run, the official camping chair will be sold as a Fun Run limited item. This special piece is designed as a premium collectible for fans.hololive production Cheer UP Pop-Up CaféDates: October 18 – December 6, 2025 Place: 171 Live Oak Ave Suite D, Arcadia, CA 91006Food and Drinks details will be announced later. #hololiveCheerUP #hololiveFunRun #hololiveCafe #hololiveUSA #OUENEVENTUSA
